Package org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena

Class RdfStreamParser

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.marshall.Context
org.apache.juneau.marshall.MarshallingContextable
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.Parser
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.InputStreamParser
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena.RdfStreamParser
All Implemented Interfaces:
RdfMetaProvider, XmlMetaProvider
Direct Known Subclasses:
RdfProtoParser, RdfThriftParser
public class RdfStreamParser extends InputStreamParser implements RdfMetaProvider
Stream-based RDF parser for binary formats (RDF/THRIFT, RDF/PROTO).

Extends InputStreamParser and delegates RDF metadata to an internal RdfParser.

Notes:
  • This class is thread safe and reusable.
See Also:
  • {doc jmr.RdfDetails}

    • copy

      public RdfStreamParser.Builder<?> copy()
      Description copied from class: Context
      Creates a builder from this context object.

      Builders are used to define new contexts (e.g. serializers, parsers) based on existing configurations.

    • createSession

      public RdfStreamParserSession.Builder createSession()
      Description copied from class: Context
      Create a session builder based on the properties defined on this context.

      Use this method for creating sessions where you want to override basic settings. Otherwise, use Context.getSession() directly.

      Overrides:
      createSession in class InputStreamParser
      Returns:
      A new session builder.
